user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new appreciation category, so that employees can be recognized under defined categories
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Appreciation Categories screen; When I click Add new appreciation category and enter a name, description and points; Then the category is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to assign points to each appreciation category, so that recognition can be scored consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating an appreciation category; When I enter a points value; Then the category is stored with that points value

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all appreciation categories with name, description and points, so that I can review the recognition framework
acceptance_criteria: Given appreciation categories exist; When I open the list; Then each row shows Name, Description and Points

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing appreciation category, so that I can refine its description or points
acceptance_criteria: Given a category is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated category is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the appreciation categories list, so that I see the current set of categories
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Appreciation Categories screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads
